Final Jeopardy.Content: Falcons have long been a symbol status in the Middle East and, like dogs and cats are allowed to fly on commercial planes with their owners. This major Middle Eastern airline has the fewest restrictions for traveling with falcons, allowing passengers on any flight, in any cabin class to bring a falcon free of charge.
